placement_observations.size_descriptor: generic eltwise tile-aligned tensor (tested with values in [-43566, 43565], float32)
placement_observations.source: test_unary_floor: ttnn.from_torch(in_data1, dtype=ttnn.float32, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device); default interleaved DRAM, no memory_config override

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small/medium tile tensors in cache-entry tests
placement_observations.program_config: sub_core_grids=CoreRangeSet([CoreRange((0,0),(3,3))]) or CoreRangeSet([CoreRange((0,0),(5,5))]); note: sub_core_grids choice and interleaved-vs-subgrid factory are part of the program cache key (different grids -> different cache entries)
placement_observations.source: cache tests: ttnn.floor(tt_a1, sub_core_grids=grid_a) / ttnn.floor(tt_a2, sub_core_grids=grid_b); device.cache_entries_counter.total == 2
